title: Metallic bonding
summary: 9701 AS — delocalised electrons and properties of metals.

simpleExplanation.title: Sea of electrons
simpleExplanation.summary: Metal cations sit in a lattice surrounded by delocalised electrons that hold the structure together.

sections.content: **Metallic bonding** (3.3) contrasts **ionic and covalent** models. Properties must follow from **mobile electrons**.
